name: apps.manifest.update
desc: Update an app from an app manifest

manifest.desc: A JSON app manifest encoded as a string. This manifest must use a valid app manifest schema - read our guide to creating one. As this method entirely _replaces_ any previous configuration, manifest must contain both unmodified and modified fields.

app_id.desc: The ID of the app whose configuration you want to update.

errors.access_denied: Access to a resource specified in the request is denied.
errors.accesslimited: Access to this method is limited on the current network.
errors.account_inactive: Authentication token is for a deleted user or workspace when using a bot token.
errors.app_not_eligible: The specified app is not eligible for this API.
errors.app_not_owned_by_manager_app: The specified app is not managed by the calling manager app.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_failed: Dynamic client registration failed for an MCP server that requires OAuth authentication.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_invalid_redi: The remote server rejected Slack's redirect URI during Dynamic Client Registration. The server must allowlist https://oauth2.slack.com/external/auth/callback as a valid redirect URI.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_invalid_resp: The MCP server returned an invalid response during Dynamic Client Registration.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_missing_oaut: The MCP server's OAuth metadata is missing a required authorization or token endpoint.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_not_supporte: The MCP server's OAuth metadata does not include a registration endpoint. The server may not support Dynamic Client Registration.
errors.dynamic_client_registration_rejected: The MCP server rejected the Dynamic Client Registration request.
errors.ekm_access_denied: Administrators have suspended the ability to post a message.
errors.enterprise_is_restricted: The method cannot be called from an Enterprise.
errors.failed_adding_collaborator: Failed writing a collaborator record for this new app
errors.failed_creating_app: Failed to create the app model
errors.fatal_error: The server could not complete your operation(s) without encountering a catastrophic error. It's possible some aspect of the operation succeeded before the error was raised.
errors.invalid_app: An app created from the provided manifest would not be valid.
errors.invalid_app_id: The app id passed is invalid.
errors.invalid_arg_name: The method was passed an argument whose name falls outside the bounds of accepted or expected values. This includes very long names and names with non-alphanumeric characters other than _. If you get this error, it is typically an indication that you have made a very malformed API call.
errors.invalid_array_arg: The method was passed an array as an argument. Please only input valid strings.
errors.invalid_charset: The method was called via a POST request, but the charset specified in the Content-Type header was invalid. Valid charset names are: utf-8 iso-8859-1.
errors.invalid_form_data: The method was called via a POST request with Content-Type application/x-www-form-urlencoded or multipart/form-data, but the form data was either missing or syntactically invalid.
errors.invalid_manifest: The provided manifest file does not validate against schema.
errors.invalid_post_type: The method was called via a POST request, but the specified Content-Type was invalid. Valid types are: application/json application/x-www-form-urlencoded multipart/form-data text/plain.
errors.is_bot: This method cannot be called by a legacy bot.
errors.missing_post_type: The method was called via a POST request and included a data payload, but the request did not include a Content-Type header.
errors.missing_scope: The token used is not granted the specific scope permissions required to complete this request.
errors.no_permission: User does not have permission to update app
errors.not_allowed_token_type: The token type used in this request is not allowed.
errors.oauth_metadata_not_found: Could not discover OAuth metadata for the MCP server. Ensure the server exposes a .well-known/oauth-authorization-server or .well-known/openid-configuration endpoint.
errors.org_login_required: The workspace is undergoing an enterprise migration and will not be available until migration is complete.
errors.ratelimited: Too many calls in succession to update endpoint during a short period of time.
errors.request_timeout: The method was called via a POST request, but the POST data was either missing or truncated.
errors.team_added_to_org: The workspace associated with your request is currently undergoing migration to an Enterprise Organization. Web API and other platform operations will be intermittently unavailable until the transition is complete.
errors.token_revoked: Authentication token is for a deleted user or workspace or the app has been removed when using a user token.
